title: Social and Community Service Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the activities of a social service program or community outreach organization. Oversee the program or organization's budget and policies regarding participant involvement, program requirements, and benefits. Work may involve directing social workers, counselors, or probation officers.

tasks.text: Establish and oversee administrative procedures to meet objectives set by boards of directors or senior management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct activities of professional and technical staff members and volunteers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the work of staff and volunteers to ensure that programs are of appropriate quality and that resources are used effectively.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Participate in the determination of organizational policies regarding such issues as participant eligibility, program requirements, and program benefits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain records and reports, such as budgets, personnel records, or training manuals.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Provide direct service and support to individuals or clients, such as handling a referral for child advocacy issues, conducting a needs evaluation, or resolving complaints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and maintain relationships with other agencies and organizations in community to meet community needs and to ensure that services are not duplicated.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit, interview, and hire or sign up volunteers and staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research and analyze member or community needs to determine program directions and goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement and evaluate staff, volunteer, or community training programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Act as consultants to agency staff and other community programs regarding the interpretation of program-related federal, state, and county regulations and policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Speak to community groups to explain and interpret agency purposes, programs, and policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze proposed legislation, regulations, or rule changes to determine how agency services could be impacted.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan and administer budgets for programs, equipment, and support services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent organizations in relations with governmental and media institutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct fundraising activities and the preparation of public relations materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
